events.raw_text:

Wed, Jun 18, 2025 · 5:30 PM to 8:00 PM CDT

Sky Lounge @ North Loop Green 360

360 N 5th St (34th Floor) · Minneapolis, MN

Report Ad
dbt Global Circuit Series: Minneapolis
D

Hosted by dbt L.

Super Organizer

Minneapolis dbt Meetup
4.5
6 reviews
Details

Join us as we dive into the latest tools and ideas dbt Labs has been shipping — what they unlock, how they fit together, and why we built them the way we did.

This meetup is designed for builders, thinkers, and tinkerers — folks who want to roll up their sleeves (figuratively), learn from each other, and imagine what’s next for the analytics engineering stack.

Whether you’re curious about what’s new, want to see how others are approaching similar problems, or just want to ask hard questions — you’re in the right place.

🤝Organizers: dbt Labs (Katie Chubb)
🏠Venue: North Loop Green 360, 34th floor Sky Lounge @ 360 N 5th St.
🍕Catering: Refreshments and bites will be provided
To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation:** https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

📝Agenda

5:30 - 6:00 | Check-in
6:00- 6:30 | "For Builders, by Builders: The Latest Tools from dbt Labs + Q&A with Thomas Grabowski, Product Manager, AI
6:30 - 7:45/8:00 | Reception & Networking

Transportation
🚆 The Light Rail stops right in front of the building. The station is "Target Field."
Parking

The building offers an underground parking ramp.
Parking will be validated
Once parked, call the Concierge Team at (612) 489-0045 and they’ll meet you at the entrance to escort you up to the 34th floor Sky Lounge.

Building Access

Enter through the lobby and check in with a valid photo ID at the front desk.
Let the team know you’re here for the dbt Labs meetup.
The Concierge Team will escort you to the 34th floor Sky Lounge.

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
***
dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 50,000 organizations worldwide. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

events.raw_text:

Online event

This event has passed

Report Ad
Community AMA with Erica Louie (dbt Labs)
Network event
D

Hosted by dbt L.

Super Organizer

Minneapolis dbt Meetup
4.5
6 reviews
Details

REGISTER HERE 👉 https://www.getdbt.com/resources/webinars/community-slack-ama

🚀 Hey Community! Are you ready to dive deep, get insights, and satisfy your curiosity?

We’re hosting monthly live Ask Me Anything events! It's the perfect platform to quench your curiosity and get to know each other better. Don't miss out on this opportunity to connect and learn together.

What to Expect:

Discussing trends in the analytics space
Sharing key takeaways from the recent events
Hearing your questions and thoughts

Speaker: Erica Louie, Data @ dbt Labs
Host: Bolaji Oyejide, Digital Community Mgr @ dbt Labs
Topic: Careers in data, building a data team, the dbt Semantic Layer, and scaling your dbt project
When: November 21st @ 2pm EST
Where: Virtual and in #dbt-community-merge

Erica was the second employee at dbt Labs, then called Fishtown Analytics and she's seen dbt grow, a lot. In this AMA, Erica will share more on her career in data, her strong opinions on building a data team, how she manages her team, the dbt Semantic Layer, scaling your dbt project, and more on her Substack.

Register now to get the link to watch and join the #dbt-community-ama channel in Slack to participate live!

Read more
Speaker
Erica Louie, dbt Labs

Second hire at dbt Labs, former Head of Data, and now leading the product data team (and previously worked for BuzzFeed's data team), Erica "ric" Louie proudly hails from a liberal arts background (studied political science + italian) and grew her career in data at dbt Labs starting from the ground-up. She firmly believes that anyone can be a data practitioner with the right mentors, resources (sans trivial data jargon), and a good sense of humor. While rethinking the philosophy behind data systems, operations, and teams is one of her favorite topics, she enjoys thinking and writing about the human experience, and how it intersects with the work we choose to do and who we choose to do it with.

events.raw_text:

Tue, Jul 16, 2024 · 5:30 PM to 8:00 PM CDT

1515 Central Ave NE suite 100

1515 Central Ave NE suite 100 · Minneapolis, MN

Online event

This event has passed

Report Ad
Minneapolis dbt Meetup

Hosted by Thomas S. and 2 others

Minneapolis dbt Meetup
4.5
6 reviews
Details

What are dbt meetups? dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

🤝Organizer: Improving
🏠Venue Host: Improving (1515 Central Ave. NE, Suite 100, Minneapolis, Minnesota 55413)
🍕Catering: TBA

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

📝Agenda (still in progress. Times may shift slightly!)
5:30-6:00 Check-in, mingling
6:00-7:00 Presentation and Q&A
7:00-8:00 Networking

Presentation Title
Getting Value dbt Cloud

Abstract
dbt Cloud has undergone significant advancements over the past year, introducing a range of new features that empower data teams to enhance governance, observability, collaboration, and project structure. While these advancements offer tremendous potential, transitioning to utilize these features can feel daunting for existing data teams.

In this presentation, we will delve into three key aspects: dbt Explorer, the Semantic Layer, and our optimized project structure. These components facilitate seamless collaboration, whether you're embracing them today or considering a shift towards a data mesh architecture. By exploring these features, attendees will grasp how they bolster project reliability and efficiency, elevate data quality, reduce costs, and amplify ROI.

Moreover, we'll emphasize the scalability of dbt Cloud, highlighting how it positions your organization for future growth. Attendees will discover that even small, incremental changes can unlock the full potential of dbt Cloud, maximizing ROI regardless of your current dbt implementation status. Through this presentation, we aim to equip your organization with the insights and strategies needed to harness the transformative power of dbt Cloud and propel your data initiatives to new heights.

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
----------------------------------

dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 30,000 organizations worldwide. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Read more
Speaker
Tom Schiro, Principal Consultant @ Improving

Tom Schiro is an experienced Principal Analytics Engineer, blending technical prowess with sharp business acumen across various technologies and solutions. He's honed a versatile skill set while acknowledging that despite technological advancements, data professionals still face similar challenges from the past. The primary goal of Tom is to bring organization and structure to data projects, ultimately driving better outcomes.

Whether you’re looking at flight data, sales figures, consumer transactions, or biometric stats — access to the correct sources + a well-trained user + BI tools + dbt = data that works!!

Thu, Apr 18, 2024 · 5:30 PM to 8:00 PM CDT

FINNEGANS Brew Co.

817 5th Ave S · Minneapolis, MN

Report Ad
Minneapolis dbt Meetup (Happy Hour)
D

Hosted by dbt L.

Super Organizer

Minneapolis dbt Meetup
4.5
6 reviews
Details

dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! We are excited to bring Minneapolis -based folks in the dbt Community together! This meetup will not feature content, but is rather an opportunity for folks to connect and build connections with other analytics engineers and data folks.

🤝Organizer: dbt Labs
🏠Venue Host: Finnegan's Brewery (@ 817 5th Avenue South, Minneapolis, MN 55404) Our section is called Patio & East Lounge.
🍹Refreshments: 2 drink tickets for beer & soft drinks will be covered
🍕Catering: If you wish, there will be a food truck (TBD) at your own expense please!

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy
📝Agenda

5:30 | Check in and nametags
6:00 | Welcome Remarks by Meetup Host (5 min)
7:40 | Thank you and closing remarks
8:00 | Event ends. If you wish to continue hanging out, you can move to the main bar section.

While this inaugural happy hour is organized by dbt Labs, we are looking for organizers and speakers for future Minneapolis dbt Meetups! Please speak to us at the event if you're interested.

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).
----------------------------------
dbt allows teams to ship trusted data products, faster. dbt is a data transformation framework that lets analysts and engineers collaborate using their shared knowledge of SQL. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust.

Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/
